nasb.text: In that day there will be great mourning in Jerusalem, like the mourning of Hadadrimmon in the plain of Megiddo.

esv.text: On that day the mourning in Jerusalem will be as great as the mourning for Hadad-rimmon in the plain of Megiddo.

cnv.text: 到那日，耶路撒冷必有極大的哀哭，像在米吉多平原的哈達臨門的哀哭一樣。

ccb.text: 到那天，耶路撒冷必一片哀声，犹如米吉多平原的哈达临门的哀声。
